steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0002_baseline_evaluation branch from main and set up worktree.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0001_stt_benchmark is completed and gold-92 dataset is available.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure including assets/predictions/ for two predictions assets.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review Whisper paper and any relevant STT evaluation papers in the corpus.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Research Deepgram Nova-2 API documentation, Whisper inference setup, and STT evaluation frameworks.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0001 dataset asset structure and any utilities relevant to loading gold-92 audio.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design evaluation pipeline: Deepgram API calls, Whisper inference, metric computation, BCa bootstrap, charts.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Provision GPU instance for Whisper Large v3 inference if local CPU is too slow.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run Deepgram Nova-2 and Whisper Large v3 on gold-92; compute all five registered metrics with BCa CIs.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Destroy GPU instance and download results after Whisper inference completes.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Identify non-obvious analysis angles: per-accent breakdown, per-entity-type analysis, latency-accuracy tradeoffs.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json with both system results and all charts.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare entity accuracy and WER against published Whisper Large v3 and Deepgram benchmarks.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Formulate suggestions for post-correction and fine-tuning tasks based on baseline gaps.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Final verificator pass, session capture, task.json status update.
